requirement_topic.en: CRA Qatar Mandatory Radio / Telecom Terminal Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 卡塔尔CRA强制无线电/电信终端型号认证
requirement_topic.zht: 卡達CRA強制無線電/電信終端型號認證

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, IoT, and any device using radio spectrum) must obtain mandatory type approval from the Communications Regulatory Authority of Qatar (CRA — هيئة الاتصالات) before import or sale in Qatar. The CRA type approval certificate and approval number must appear visibly on the device and packaging label in both Arabic and English. Approval requires test reports from a CRA-accepted accredited laboratory to ITU, ETSI, or equivalent standards. CE Declaration of Conformity, FCC ID, SRRC radio type approval, and CCC certification are not directly accepted by CRA Qatar as substitutes. The Ministry of Communications and Information Technology (MCIT) provides overarching ICT policy direction, while CRA administers operational type approval. The GCC Mutual Recognition Arrangement (GCC MRA) creates a strong incentive for a GCC-wide type approval strategy: a CRA Qatar approval certificate may be leveraged for recognition by CITRA Kuwait, TRA UAE, and NTRA Bahrain under bilateral GCC MRA arrangements, avoiding full separate applications for each Gulf state.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa、物联网及任何使用无线频谱的设备）须在进口或于卡塔尔销售前取得卡塔尔通信监管局（CRA — هيئة الاتصالات）的强制型号认证。CRA型号认证证书及审批号须以阿拉伯文和英文清晰标注于设备和包装标签上。认证需提交经CRA认可的认可实验室依据ITU、ETSI或等效标准出具的测试报告。CE符合性声明、FCC ID、SRRC无线电型号认证及CCC认证均不被卡塔尔CRA直接接受为替代。通信和信息技术部（MCIT）提供整体ICT政策方向，CRA负责管理运营型号认证。GCC相互承认协议（GCC MRA）为GCC多市场型号认证策略提供了强激励：卡塔尔CRA审批证书可在GCC MRA双边安排下向科威特CITRA、阿联酋TRA和巴林NTRA申请认可，避免对每个海湾国家单独提交完整申请。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa、物聯網及任何使用無線頻譜的設備）須在進口或於卡達銷售前取得卡達通信監管局（CRA — هيئة الاتصالات）的強制型號認證。CRA型號認證證書及審批號須以阿拉伯文和英文清晰標注於裝置和包裝標籤上。認證需提交經CRA認可的認可實驗室依據ITU、ETSI或等效標準出具的測試報告。CE符合性聲明、FCC ID、SRRC無線電型號認證及CCC認證均不被卡達CRA直接接受為替代。通信和資訊技術部（MCIT）提供整體ICT政策方向，CRA負責管理運營型號認證。GCC相互承認協議（GCC MRA）為GCC多市場型號認證策略提供了強激勵：卡達CRA審批證書可在GCC MRA雙邊安排下向科威特CITRA、阿聯酋TRA和巴林NTRA申請認可，避免對每個海灣國家單獨提交完整申請。

standards_or_laws: Qatar Law No. 34 of 2006 on Telecommunications (CRA establishment and type approval mandate)
CRA Qatar Type Approval Procedures and Technical Requirements
ETSI EN 300 328 v2.2.2 (2.4 GHz Wi-Fi / Bluetooth)
GCC MRA for Telecommunications and IT Equipment (bilateral recognition: CITRA Kuwait, TRA UAE, NTRA Bahrain)

summary.en: In China, radio type approval for wireless devices is administered by MIIT/SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) under the Regulations on Radio Administration. Telecom terminal equipment connecting to public networks additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under GB 4943.1 and GB/T 9254 covers electrical safety and EMC for products within the CCC catalogue. China MIIT/SRRC type approval, MIIT NAL, and CCC are the baseline certifications for domestic sale.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备的无线电型号认证由工信部/国家无线电管理局（SRRC）依据《无线电管理条例》负责。连接公共网络的电信终端设备还须取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）依据GB 4943.1和GB/T 9254涵盖CCC目录内产品的电气安全和EMC。中国工信部/SRRC型号认证、工信部NAL和CCC是境内销售的基础认证。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線裝置的無線電型號認證由工信部/國家無線電管理局（SRRC）依據《無線電管理條例》負責。連接公共網路的電信終端設備還須取得工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）依據GB 4943.1和GB/T 9254涵蓋CCC目錄內產品的電氣安全和EMC。中國工信部/SRRC型號認證、工信部NAL和CCC是境內銷售的基礎認證。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (Regulations on Radio Administration, Article 58)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Administration of Telecom Equipment Access

gap.en: CRA Qatar type approval is a wholly independent process from SRRC, CCC, CE, or FCC. CRA Qatar does not recognise SRRC radio approval, CCC certification, CE DoC, or FCC ID. While the GCC MRA formally covers mutual recognition among Gulf Cooperation Council member states, CRA Qatar enforces type approval as a national requirement for every import in practice. A fresh CRA Qatar application with accredited-lab test reports, Arabic and English labelling, and the CRA certificate number on device and packaging is required. The strategic upside: once CRA Qatar approval is obtained, it can serve as the anchor for GCC MRA recognition filings with CITRA Kuwait, TRA UAE, and NTRA Bahrain, making a Qatar-first approval strategy commercially efficient for China exporters targeting multiple Gulf markets.
gap.zh: 卡塔尔CRA型号认证与SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全独立。卡塔尔CRA不承认SRRC无线电批准、CCC认证、CE DoC或FCC ID。尽管GCC MRA正式覆盖海湾合作委员会成员国之间的相互承认，卡塔尔CRA在实践中对每次进口均将型号认证作为国家要求强制执行。须提交全新的CRA卡塔尔申请，附经认可实验室出具的测试报告，并在设备和包装上以阿拉伯文和英文标注CRA证书编号。战略优势在于：一旦取得卡塔尔CRA批准，可作为GCC MRA认可申请的基础，向科威特CITRA、阿联酋TRA和巴林NTRA寻求认可，使以卡塔尔为首的认证策略对目标多个海湾市场的中国出口商具有商业效率。
gap.zht: 卡達CRA型號認證與SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全獨立。卡達CRA不承認SRRC無線電批准、CCC認證、CE DoC或FCC ID。儘管GCC MRA正式涵蓋海灣合作委員會成員國之間的相互承認，卡達CRA在實踐中對每次進口均將型號認證作為國家要求強制執行。須提交全新的卡達CRA申請，附經認可實驗室出具的測試報告，並在裝置和包裝上以阿拉伯文和英文標注CRA證書編號。戰略優勢在於：一旦取得卡達CRA批准，可作為GCC MRA認可申請的基礎，向科威特CITRA、阿聯酋TRA和巴林NTRA尋求認可，使以卡達為首的認證策略對目標多個海灣市場的中國出口商具有商業效率。

source.publisher: CRA — Communications Regulatory Authority Qatar (هيئة الاتصالات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CRA Qatar type approval is mandatory for all wireless and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in Qatar. SRRC, CCC, CE DoC, and FCC ID are not directly accepted. The CRA certificate number must appear in Arabic and English on device and packaging. GCC MRA bilateral arrangements with CITRA Kuwait, TRA UAE, and NTRA Bahrain create a multi-market leverage opportunity for holders of a CRA Qatar approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卡塔尔CRA型号认证对所有在卡塔尔进口或销售的无线及电信终端设备为强制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不被直接接受。CRA证书编号须以阿拉伯文和英文标注于设备和包装上。GCC MRA与科威特CITRA、阿联酋TRA和巴林NTRA的双边安排，为卡塔尔CRA审批持有者创造了多市场联动机会。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 卡達CRA型號認證對所有在卡達進口或銷售的無線及電信終端設備為強制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不被直接接受。CRA證書編號須以阿拉伯文和英文標注於裝置和包裝上。GCC MRA與科威特CITRA、阿聯酋TRA和巴林NTRA的雙邊安排，為卡達CRA審批持有者創造了多市場聯動機會。
